page: OVHcloud c3-4 is a compute-optimized server powered by an AMD EPYC x86_64 processor. It features 2 dedicated physical cores (2 vCPUs) running at 2.3 GHz with 1 thread per core, backed by 32 MB of L3 cache. The system is equipped with 4.0 GB of RAM, providing 2.0 GB per core, and includes 50 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. It runs on the KVM hypervisor and includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Benchmark results indicate strong single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance ranking in the top tier (top 10%) and Geekbench single-core scoring in the top 25%. However, multi-core and memory-bound metrics show limitations. Geekbench multi-core, software compilation, and Passmark CPU scores fall into the bottom 25%. Memory bandwidth for small blocks is weak, though large block read and write speeds maintain average performance.

Given the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this server offers predictable single-threaded execution but is constrained by its 4.0 GB memory capacity and weak multi-threaded scaling. It is best suited for lightweight single-threaded applications, text processing, and basic utility hosting rather than high-throughput web serving or memory-intensive database operations.
description: The OVHcloud c3-4 is a compute-optimized server featuring an AMD EPYC x86_64 processor with 2 dedicated physical cores (2 vCPUs) running at 2.3 GHz. It is configured with 4.0 GB of RAM, 50 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and operates on the KVM hypervisor. Benchmarks reveal a clear performance split: single-core capabilities are strong, with stress-ng single-core performance reaching the top 10% and Geekbench single-core in the top 25%. Conversely, multi-core performance, software compilation, and memory bandwidth for small blocks fall into the bottom 25%. With its dedicated CPU allocation and low memory-to-vCPU ratio, this instance is highly cost-efficient for predictable, single-threaded workloads and basic text processing, though it is poorly suited for high-throughput web serving or memory-heavy databases.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-4 is a compute-optimized server featuring 2 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 4 GB RAM, and 50 GB NVMe SSD storage. It offers strong single-core performance but limited multi-core scaling.
meta_description: OVHcloud c3-4 is a compute-optimized KVM server featuring 2 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 4 GB RAM, and 50 GB NVMe SSD storage for single-threaded workloads.
tagline: A dedicated dual-core AMD EPYC server delivering strong single-threaded performance and local NVMe storage for lightweight compute workloads.
bullet_points: 2 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores (2 vCPUs) at 2.3 GHz
4.0 GB RAM and 50 GB local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier single-core CPU performance in stress-ng benchmarks
KVM hypervisor with 1 complimentary public IPv4 address
Best suited for single-threaded tasks and basic text processing
